comment: Free Text injection through autoseq queue. Covers: (1) empty queue — FT fires in next available slot via fallback parity; (2) non-empty queue — FT inherits queue[0] parity, waits behind the active QSO, fires after the QSO completes; (3) one-shot semantics — after emission, FT ctx is evicted by tick and does not retry.

periods.comment: Period 0 (even): empty queue, inject FT. Should fire in period 1 (next slot, fallback parity).
Period 1 (odd, fallback parity): FT should TX here.
Period 2 (even): FT was one-shot, queue empty again.
Period 3 (odd): DX CQ arrives. Touch to start a QSO.
Period 4 (even): we TX1 (grid) to DX. Queue parity = even.
Period 5 (odd): inject FT while QSO is active. FT should inherit queue parity (even) and wait.
Period 6 (even): QSO continues (TX1 retry or TX2). FT waits — QSO has higher priority.
Period 7 (odd): DX sends TX2 — we advance to ROGER_REPORT.
Period 9 (odd): DX sends TX5 (73) — terminal, QSO ctx evicted. FT is now queue[0].
Period 10 (even): FT should TX now on the inherited even parity.
Period 11 (odd): FT was one-shot, queue empty.
